Package neqsim.util.nucleation

package neqsim.util.nucleation
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.util
     
  • Class
    Description
    ClassicalNucleationTheory
    General-purpose Classical Nucleation Theory (CNT) model for predicting particle formation from supersaturated vapors.
    MulticomponentNucleation
    Multicomponent nucleation model for predicting droplet formation from supersaturated multicomponent gas mixtures.
    MulticomponentNucleation.NucleationMode
    Enumeration of multicomponent nucleation approaches.
    PopulationBalanceModel
    Population Balance Model (PBM) for tracking the evolution of particle size distributions over time.
    SpinodalDecompositionDetector
    Detects spinodal decomposition conditions in thermodynamic systems.
    SpinodalDecompositionDetector.StabilityState
    Enumeration of thermodynamic stability states.
